comic.noLibraryDesc: Imported compressed archives and image files can be automatically recognized as comics
comic.folderTips: If not set directory manually, a new folder will be created as a library and eligible compressed archives or folders in this library will be imported as comics
comic.chapterComicDesc: Compressed archives and folders containing images under the library path will be recognized as comic chapters, and their parent categories will be recognized as comics
comic.onePieceComicDesc: Compressed archives and folders containing images under the library path will be recognized as one-shots
comic.archiveTips: Each compressed archive will be recognized as a chapter, and its parent folder name will be recognized as the comic name (supported formats: cbz, cbt, cb7, cbr, rar, tar, zip, 7z, pdf, epub, mobi)
comic.imgTips: Each folder containing images will be recognized as a chapter, and its parent folder name will be recognized as the comic name (supported formats: jpg, png, jpeg, etc.)
comic.pathAlreadyExistsTips: This folder is already associated with the "{0}" library, please select another folder.
comic.deleteTips: This action will remove the selected library, and comic files will not be affected
comic.maxLimitTips: The library limit has been reached (maximum: {0})
comic.singleArchiveTips: Each compressed archive will be recognized as a comic (supported formats: cbz, cbt, cb7, cbr, rar, tar, zip, 7z, pdf, epub, mobi)
comic.singleImgTips: Each folder containing images will be recognized as a comic (supported formats: jpg, png, jpeg, etc.)

common.requestErrorTip: Request failed, please try again later
